
.. _file_include_umidi_protocol_umi_sysex.hh:

File umi_sysex.hh
=================

|exhale_lsh| :ref:`Parent directory <dir_include_umidi_protocol>` (``include/umidi/protocol``)

.. |exhale_lsh| unicode:: U+021B0 .. UPWARDS ARROW WITH TIP LEFTWARDS



UMI SysEx Protocol - main include file. 



.. contents:: Contents
   :local:
   :backlinks: none

Definition (``include/umidi/protocol/umi_sysex.hh``)
----------------------------------------------------


.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   program_listing_file_include_umidi_protocol_umi_sysex.hh.rst



Detailed Description
--------------------

This file aggregates all protocol components. For smaller builds, include individual headers directly. 




Includes
--------


- ``commands.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_commands.hh`)

- ``cstring``

- ``encoding.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_encoding.hh`)

- ``message.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_message.hh`)

- ``standard_io.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_standard_io.hh`)

- ``umi_auth.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_umi_auth.hh`)

- ``umi_bootloader.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_umi_bootloader.hh`)

- ``umi_firmware.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_umi_firmware.hh`)

- ``umi_session.hh`` (:ref:`file_include_umidi_protocol_umi_session.hh`)
